title: File Permission
description: Perintah untuk mengelola permission dan atribut file di macOS.

commands.name: chmod
commands.title: Change Mode
commands.examples:
chmod +x script.sh
chmod 755 app
chmod -R 644 ~/Documents/public/
chmod u+rw,go-w file.txt

commands.name: chown
commands.title: Change Owner
commands.examples:
sudo chown user file.txt
sudo chown user:staff folder/
sudo chown -R $(whoami) ~/Projects/

commands.name: xattr
commands.title: Extended Attributes (macOS)
commands.description: Mengelola extended attributes (xattr) file di macOS.
commands.examples:
xattr file.zip
xattr -l app.dmg
xattr -d com.apple.quarantine app.zip
xattr -cr ~/Downloads/app.app
commands.notes: Sering digunakan untuk menghapus quarantine flag dari file yang diunduh: `xattr -d com.apple.quarantine`.
commands.warning: Hati-hati menghapus quarantine dari file yang tidak terpercaya.

commands.name: umask
commands.title: User Mask
commands.description: Mengatur default permission untuk file baru.

commands.name: chflags
commands.title: Change Flags (macOS)
commands.examples:
chflags hidden secret_folder
chflags nohidden secret_folder
chflags uchg important.doc
sudo chflags nouchg important.doc
commands.notes: Fitur khusus macOS/BSD, tidak ada di Linux.
